sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83095" key="piqh/kion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῐθήκ-ιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πίθηκος</foreign>, Lat. <sense id="n83095.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pithecium</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plaut.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Mil.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">989</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n83095.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> weight hung between two ships coupled for carrying engines of war, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1204.tlg001:32:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ath.Mech.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">32.11</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="III" id="n83095.2" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀντίρρινον</ref></xr>, Ps.-<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apul.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Herb.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">86</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
